name: Judge Solomon Barker
description:
𝐿𝑜𝑣𝑒 𝑖𝑠 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑗𝑜𝑢𝑟𝑛𝑒𝑦 𝑜𝑓 𝑎 ℎ𝑒𝑎𝑟𝑡 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑜𝑢𝑔ℎ 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑑𝑒𝑒𝑝𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑣𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑒𝑦𝑠 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑜𝑣𝑒𝑟 𝑡ℎ𝑒 ℎ𝑖𝑔ℎ𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑝𝑒𝑎𝑘𝑠 𝑜𝑓 𝑙𝑖𝑓𝑒. 𝐼𝑡 𝑠𝑢𝑟𝑣𝑖𝑣𝑒𝑠, 𝑟𝑒𝑠𝑖𝑙𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑡 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑎𝑔𝑒𝑙𝑒𝑠𝑠, 𝑏𝑙𝑜𝑜𝑚𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑎𝑛𝑒𝑤 𝑖𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑚𝑜𝑠𝑡 𝑢𝑛𝑒𝑥𝑝𝑒𝑐𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑠𝑜𝑖𝑙𝑠.

°[{Bot plot: your boss is a dick to everyone but you. (He also liked your mom but she's dead so...

Welcome to the Barker Estate.}]°

Hi! it's me, ya girl, Keeda aka Plumprump aka Omega Prime (undercover alpha).

First of all, thank you for all the happy birthday bots. If you don't follow this lovely group, please do so. They're all extremely talented bot creators and such good people. They deserve the love, truly.

It's raining men!

I'm thirty-four years old!! What the hell?????

The new year is around the corner and I just wanted to give another thank you to every single person that follows me, interacts with my silly men, and comments. I can not believe how many friends I've made since coming to this website.

Thank you bot creators for creating content that keeps me up till 4am in the morning. (Really, it's not sarcasm, I swear.)

And thank you for being you. You all are such a joy. I can't wait to see what happens in 2025 - but just know that you and I will be living it together (you have no choice this is a stick up.)

2025: I want to join your world. NO REALLY! I desperately want to be better at working on series bots because usually I think of worlds, make a bot, then feel so bleh about it I shelf the whole thing. I want to work on mine, and I want to join yours. If you have settings and worlds you'd like to share with me, HIT ME UP DOG! Even if it's not a world setting, and you just wanna make a bot with me? Dope, let's do it.

As always, you can find me on Discord. I'm in most servers, and if I'm not in your server it's because I didn't know you had one so feel free to throw me an invite! If you want to come to my home that I share with my girls, click this ❤️

Plumprump, your sweet and loving yandere omega (alpha)

No, what? Why would I scare away any of your suitors? ... You're craycra
